instruction: Cross-reference your conditions, medications, and lab results to close the seeded care gaps using only appointments: 1) Schedule exactly one cardiology follow-up appointment with reason "Atrial fibrillation care gap", 2) Schedule exactly one endocrinology follow-up appointment with reason "Diabetes care gap", 3) Schedule exactly one PCP follow-up appointment with reason "Abnormal lab follow-up". Do not send any messages and do not modify any prescriptions.
